Press/News at the Molecular Sciences Institute

Note: Some external links to full articles unfortunately require registration and login, or worse, the links may have
changed and are now outdated. Highlighted titles link to screen captures from the first page of each article.

Wired Online: Pufferfish: Sushi or Science? by Kristen Philipkoski (June 2000). external link.

M.I.T. Tech Review: Biological Computing by Simon L. Garfinkel (May 2000). external link.

Science: Computational Biology: Simulating a Bacteriophage by Gilbert Chin (see also Bacteriophage T7 Simulation, May 2000). external link.

The New Scientist: Back to the Future by Philip Cohen (April 2000). external link.

N.Y. Times: Scientist at Work: Sydney Brenner; A Founder of Modern Biology Shapes the Genome Era, Too by Nicholas Wade (March 2000). external link.

Scientific American: Extreme Engineering: Designer Genomes by Karen Hopkin (February 2000).

Nature Biotechnology: Aptamers on the scaffold by Alan Dove (September 1999). external link.

Nature Biotechnology: Modeling the oddities of biology by Bijal Trivedi (December 1998). external link.

HMS Beagle: Engineers and Eggheads by Karen Hopkin (July 1998). external link.

HotWired Dream Jobs (1998). external link.
